java_gadgets.description: Java deserialization gadget detection -- identify exploitable Java serialized objects in requests/responses

probes.description: Java serialized HashMap (harmless) -- if accepted without error, endpoint deserializes user-controlled objects
Check for Java serialization markers in responses -- aced0005 magic bytes (base64: rO0AB) indicate serialized Java objects in transport

php_unserialize.description: PHP object injection via unserialize() -- user-controlled data enables arbitrary object instantiation

probes.description: PHP serialized stdClass -- if processed without error, unserialize() accepts user input

ruby_yaml.description: Ruby YAML deserialization -- YAML.load processes arbitrary Ruby objects including command execution gadgets

probes.description: Ruby YAML object instantiation probe -- if Gem::Installer is recognized, unsafe YAML.load is in use

python_unsafe_deser.description: Python unsafe deserialization -- user input passed to unsafe deserialization functions enables code execution

probes.description: Check for Python serialization markers in cookies/parameters -- gASV prefix (base64) or specific byte patterns indicate unsafe deserialization in transport
